description.value: Price 10,000 gp; Slot none; CL 12th; Weight â; Aura strong transmutation DESCRIPTION This pearlescent crystal is perfectly cut in the shape of a five-pointed star. EFFECTS It grants the bearer a +5 competence bonus on Acrobatics and Climb checks. When inserted into a wayfinder, it grants the bearer a +4 bonus on Reflex saves to avoid falling. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 5,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells jump; Special creator must be at least 12th level
